name: Impossible Turkey Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle turkey, mushrooms, onions, salt, and cheese in the pie plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients until smooth, in a blender on high.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, 30-35 minutes.
7. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting.
8. Refrigerate any remaining pie. Makes 6-8 servings. You can substitute smoked cooked ham for the turkey.
